title: Stone Tablet
description: K490/B123 — Stone Tablet schema. Extension of the bedrock tablet schema. A Stone Tablet is a bedrock tablet tagged with a Rhetorical Keystone anchor, representing the highest-authority class of LB knowledge artifact. Stone Tablets flow to Catacombs. Biblical resonance intentional: most-authoritative-record archetype (Moses / Ten Commandments / Mount Sinai). Geological parallel: crystallized, permanent, foundation-layer form of mined material. CJ candidate: sub-claim within #2298 (Awareness Net) or standalone #2299.

stone_tablet_id.description: Unique stone tablet ID. Format: LB-ST.{KEYSTONE_ID}-T{N:04d}. Globally unique within a keystone file.

source_tablet_id.description: The tablet_id of the original bedrock tablet this Stone Tablet was tagged from. Immutable — this is the provenance anchor.

keystone_anchor_id.description: ID of the Rhetorical Keystone that triggered this Stone Tablet. Ties to keystones_registry.json.

keystone_phrase_verbatim.description: The exact Founder-ratified keystone phrase that this tablet is anchored to.
keystone_phrase_verbatim.example: They do what IP does — pass it on, as a filter.

match_type.description: How this tablet matched the keystone. verbatim=high-confidence exact phrase found; paraphrase=60%+ of keystone words found in content; thematic=domain keywords found.

match_confidence.description: Confidence score for the match. verbatim: 0.90-1.00; paraphrase: 0.50-0.89; thematic: 0.30-0.49.

matched_words.description: Words from the keystone phrase found in the tablet content (for paraphrase matches).

matched_thematic.description: Thematic domain keywords found in the tablet content or keywords list.

inception_event_timestamp.description: When this Stone Tablet was created (the K490 retroactive tagging event timestamp).

founder_speech_act_provenance.description: Reference to the source of the keystone — memory file, transcript session, or Crown Letter.

source_corpus.description: Which mining session produced the source bedrock tablet.

miner_serial.description: Serial of the Miner that produced the source bedrock tablet.

source_file.description: Absolute path to the source corpus file that was mined.

extracted_content.description: The content extracted from the source file (preserved verbatim from bedrock tablet).

keywords.description: Keywords extracted by the Miner (preserved from bedrock tablet).

depth_level.description: Miner depth level at time of tablet creation (preserved from bedrock tablet).

original_timestamp.description: Timestamp of the original bedrock tablet creation.

provenance_chain.description: Provenance chain from the original bedrock tablet.

dedup_key.description: Deduplication key = source_tablet_id + '::' + keystone_anchor_id. Prevents duplicate Stone Tablets on re-runs.

notes: A single bedrock tablet may match multiple keystones, producing multiple Stone Tablets (one per keystone matched).
Re-running Phase A is idempotent: dedup_key prevents duplicate stone tablets.
Authority-decay: Stone Tablets are append-only authoritative. Prior Stone Tablets remain canonical as new ones accumulate.
Who can create: Keystone-registration is Founder-only (current model). Stone Tablet tagging is automated by K490 + keystone_watcher.
Stone Tablets flow to Catacombs as the highest-authority LB knowledge artifact class (CJ #2258 Tower of Peace stack).
Confidence thresholds: verbatim=0.90+, paraphrase=0.50-0.89, thematic=0.30-0.49. Downstream consumers may filter by confidence.
The name 'Stone Tablets': Biblical (Moses, Ten Commandments), Geological (crystallized foundation-layer). 'Nodules of Knowledge' is the geological alternate name for claim-language use.
